text: Fresh EU sanctions set to hit condensate imports from Russia's Yamal LNG. text: Pony.ai Announces New Generation Autonomous Driving Compute Platform Built on NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion. GUANGZHOU, China, April 25, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Pony AI Inc. ("Pony.ai") (NASDAQ: PONY; HKEX: 2026) today announced its new generation autonomous driving domain controller, a high-performance compute system designed for both Pony.ai's L4 autonomous driving platform and a broader set of customer applications across autonomous mobility. Developed in collaboration with NVIDIA, the new controller is built on the NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion platform and powered by NVIDIA DRIVE AGX Thor with NVIDIA NVLink, supporting Pony.ai's next phase of commercialization in robotaxis and its growing domain controller business.
label: positive

text: USD/JPY Weekly Outlook: Hormuz overshadows huge BOJ and Fed week. USD/JPY has reverted to a straight rates play between the US and Japan, with developments in the Gulf the key underlying driver of both outlooks. Extended uncertainty surrounding the Iran war now has both the Federal Reserve and Bank of Japan expected to keep policy settings on hold in the near term, a sharp shift from the pre-conflict view that the Fed would cut at least two times this year while the BOJ hiked twice.

text: Clearway Energy: A Yieldco Positioned For The Next Energy Demand Cycle. Clearway Energy operates a yield-focused, renewable-heavy portfolio with 98% of capacity in wind, solar, and storage, anchored by long-term PPAs for stable cash flows. Structural tailwinds include falling renewable costs and surging North American data center demand, driving long-term contract growth and margin stability for CWEN. Risks remain from interest rate sensitivity due to a debt-heavy capital structure, weather-related operational volatility, and reliance on Clearway Energy Group for project pipeline.
